Research-report lifecycle (RR cells)
1. Requested → 2. Agreed → 3. Submitted → 4. Extracted → 5. Published
Requested: briefed to Watson, nothing run yet. Agreed: parameters confirmed, brief accepted. Submitted: AlphaSense query running, not yet downloaded. Extracted: AlphaSense results downloaded to disk. Published: posted to Notion + committed to repository.
Analysis & Judgement memo lifecycle (Memos / Debriefs / Hotwashes)
1. Requested → 2. Agreed → 3. AS Submitted → 4. AS Extracted → 5. Published
Same five states as research reports. Triaging memos often skip 3+4 (Watson-direct without AlphaSense). ESA / Deep Dive typically use all five.
